title: Quantum migration
summary: NSM's quantum migration section providing advice and recommendations for how Norwegian organisations should transition to quantum-safe IT systems and post-quantum cryptographic solutions.

title: What is quantum migration?
summary: NSM explainer stating that quantum computers could break today's encryption and that organisations can and should now plan migration to post-quantum cryptography.

title: Quantum migration - guide
summary: NSM guide introducing the issues and giving advice on how organisations begin quantum migration, aimed at system owners handling sensitive information in telecom, finance, health, energy and petroleum.

title: Vulnerable algorithms (quantum migration)
summary: NSM overview of cryptographic algorithms currently in use (RSA, ECDH, ECDSA, Diffie-Hellman) that will be vulnerable to cryptographically relevant quantum computers, as part of quantum migration planning.

title: Overview report for cryptographic resources and systems
summary: NSM guidance on what organisations should report about cryptographic resources and systems expected to be vulnerable to cryptographically relevant quantum computers, supporting quantum migration.

title: Quantum migration guide (PDF) - NSM guide to quantum relocation
summary: NSM PDF guide on quantum migration (kvanteflytting), advising Norwegian organisations on transitioning to quantum-safe cryptography.

title: Cryptographic recommendations
summary: NSM cryptographic recommendations giving concrete advice on algorithms and use cases, including preparing for quantum computers by creating a plan for migration to quantum-resistant cryptography.

title: Cryptographic Recommendations - a guidance document from NSM (English)
summary: English-language NSM cryptographic recommendations that advise organisations to create and implement a plan for successful migration to quantum-resistant cryptography.

title: Cryptographic recommendations - a guidance document from NSM (Security Act guidance)
summary: NSM cryptographic recommendations issued as a guidance document under the Security Act framework, including guidance on preparing for migration to quantum-resistant cryptography.

title: Quantum computers challenge today's cryptographic solutions
summary: NSM commentary article explaining how quantum computers challenge current cryptographic solutions and the need to migrate towards post-quantum cryptography.

title: NSM opens Centre for Applied Cryptology
summary: NSM announcement of a Centre for Applied Cryptology to strengthen Norway's quantum-safe preparedness, including work on post-quantum cryptography, civilly and militarily.

title: Migration to post-quantum cryptography (Security Conference 2023 session)
summary: NSM Security Conference 2023 programme session on migration to post-quantum cryptography.

title: Post-quantum algorithms (Security Conference 2024 session)
summary: NSM Security Conference 2024 programme session on post-quantum algorithms and how quantum-secure cryptosystems rest on new mathematical assumptions.

title: QCNorway - Towards a Norwegian Quantum Computing Strategy
summary: Research Council of Norway project-bank entry for QCNorway, a project towards a Norwegian quantum computing strategy that references post-quantum cryptography as a security challenge. Borderline: a funded-research listing rather than a dedicated PQC document.

title: NSM Cryptographic Recommendations 2025 (guidance document, PDF)
summary: The 2025 edition (published March 2025) of NSM's English-language cryptographic recommendations, advising organisations to obtain a cryptographic inventory, adopt cryptographic agility, and create a plan to migrate to quantum-resistant cryptography as soon as possible. This is the dated 2025 PDF, distinct from the undated HTML landing page already in the corpus.

title: NSM Temarapport: Kvanteresistent kryptografi (thematic report on quantum-resistant cryptography)
summary: NSM thematic report on quantum-resistant cryptography explaining how cryptanalytically relevant quantum computers threaten current public-key schemes and the need to prepare for quantum-resistant algorithms. Hosted on the official nsm.no domain; the document body carries an internal date of 2017-01-24.

title: Kryptografiske utfordringer (Security Conference 2025 session)
summary: NSM Security Conference 2025 programme session (8 April 2025) on current cryptographic challenges and the challenges that quantum computers will bring, featuring a Norges Bank senior adviser.

title: NSMs kryptografiske anbefalinger (Security Conference 2025 session)
summary: NSM Security Conference 2025 programme session presenting NSM's cryptographic recommendations, including concrete algorithm advice and preparing for migration to quantum-resistant cryptography.

title: Risiko- og sårbarhetsanalyse (ROS) 2025
summary: The Norwegian Financial Supervisory Authority's 2025 risk and vulnerability analysis includes a quantum-technology threat assessment, warning of 'steal data today, decrypt later' and recommending that financial firms adopt new quantum-safe encryption algorithms, QRNG, QKD and quantum-safe hardware. First explicit QSC reference from a Norwegian financial regulator in the corpus.
